content.en:
Ye Tian didn't expect to really be able to find a treasure here that allowed him to copy his talent for promotion, he just came to try his luck and see if there was a treasure suitable for him by the way.

As a result, he also really came across the treasure that allowed the copying talent to be promoted.

"This treasure must be taken at all costs!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Following the attraction between the copying talent and the treasure, he walked slowly, and soon came to a trading shop.

The owner of this trading shop is an Extreme Dao creature at the level of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm, the Extreme Dao Stone Cow.

There are many treasures in his trading shop, including some extremely precious treasures.

Some of these extreme treasures cannot be found even in the outside world, and they are forbidden to be sold, so only such fairs are allowed to be sold and traded.

It's like one of the Extreme Path Treasures, the Extreme Path Golden Fruit, which is a treasure that is forbidden to be sold in the Extreme Deep Sea.

If you don't break the chains of the Extreme Dao, even if you cultivate to the extreme of the super-perfect controller, and even if you have realized the Extreme Dao to the realm of Xiaocheng, you will not be able to break the shackles and become the perfect controller of the Void Realm.

Basically, as long as one of the Extreme Dao chains is broken, you have the qualifications to impact the perfect controller of the Shrewd.

Of course, a true demonic genius naturally wants to break more Extreme Chains, but the treasures that can assist in breaking the Extreme Chains are too rare, just like the Extreme Creation Substance.

For a half-step perfect master, the Extreme Creation Substance is too rare, and for the Super Perfection Master, the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit is also extremely rare.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't understand why the Extreme Dao Deep Sea forbade the sale of treasures like the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, and some treasures that were more precious than the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit were not forbidden to be sold!

But now, he understood.

"The Extreme Dao Deep Sea is afraid that the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit will fall into the end of the realm, in fact, there is no shortage of Extreme Dao Golden Fruit in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, but there is a shortage of Extreme Dao Golden Fruit! Therefore, they wanted to control the circulation of treasures such as the Extreme Golden Fruit. And many of the Extreme Path creatures in the Extreme Deep Sea have very chaotic backgrounds, and some of them may have secretly taken refuge in the end of the realm, so it's not for sure. Therefore, restricting the circulation of the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, it is unrealistic for the Realm to want to collect a large number of Extreme Dao Golden Fruits!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, the trade fair here is of a very high grade, and ordinary Extreme Dao creatures are not qualified to enter at all, so the trade here is naturally not restricted.

"That treasure has to be bought, and these Extreme Dao Golden Fruits need to be bought!"

Ye Tian decided.

Soon, Ye Tian locked on a treasure, it was a strange stone, containing a kind of extreme aura, but the aura was too weak.

But Ye Tian knew very well that it was this stone that attracted the attention of the copying talent.

"What is this stone?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know. The Extreme Dao Stone Cow said: "This is a treasure that I found by accident, and it contains many kinds of Extreme Dao breath, although the Extreme Dao breath is very weak, but it is definitely a treasure." Moreover, it is very strong, so it is worth a lot. "

"How many Pole Coins?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Three hundred Extreme Dao Coins!" said Extreme Dao Shi Niu.

"It's too expensive, how about less, I just think this kind of stone is very strange, and I want to take it back to study or collect, but it's not necessarily useful. Ye Tian said.

"My resources here are clearly priced, no counteroffer!"

Extreme Dao Shi Niu said.

"How about I buy some more other treasures and give them cheaper?" Ye Tian proposed.

"Okay!"

Jidao Shiniu relented and agreed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian bought some Extreme Dao Golden Fruits, and bought all the Extreme Dao Golden Fruits in his store.

The value of the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit is one thousand Extreme Dao Coins, this price is definitely not expensive, it is very cheap, and any Extreme Dao creature can easily gather a thousand Extreme Dao Coins if they take the time to condense the Extreme Dao Coins.

The point is that those Extreme Dao creatures have no channels to buy Extreme Dao Golden Fruit at all, and once they are found to be purchased privately, the consequences are very serious.

If there was no Xuandao Order, Ye Tian would not have been able to enter here!

Subsequently, Ye Tian found some Extreme Dao treasures that were valuable to him here, and spent a total of more than 20,000 Extreme Dao Coins.

After the transaction was completed, Ye Tian left.

"This little guy actually has so many Extreme Dao Coins, it seems that he can endure loneliness, and it took a long time for the picture to condense so many Extreme Dao Coins!" muttered Extreme Dao Shi Niu.

However, those Extreme Dao treasures are of little use to him, even if they are Extreme Dao Golden Fruits, they are useless to him, and they are not allowed to be sold in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and they dare not sell them privately, it is useless to keep them, and it is good to exchange them for some Extreme Dao coins.

As for the stone, he studied it for countless years, but found no use, more like an ornamental object.

Next, Ye Tian went to a lot of shops, but all the shops with Extreme Golden Fruit were patronized by him.

However, there are also Extreme Path creatures that need the Extreme Golden Fruit, so if the speed is slower, the Extreme Golden Fruit will be traded.

However, Ye Tian's speed was not slow, and he bought a total of more than thirty Extreme Dao Golden Fruits.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed a terrifying aura, and the extremely rich extreme power spread.

At this time, many Extreme Dao creatures poured into that direction.

"Let's see!"

Ye Tian immediately passed.

Soon, Ye Tian discovered that the terrifying aura of the Extreme Dao came from a very large trading shop.

And the owner of this shop is a Extreme Creature who is the perfect controller of the True Realm, and his strength is terrifying, and it may even be no less than the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Lord of Dark Gold!"

This is the title of the other party.

At this moment, the Lord of Dark Gold took out a treasure, which attracted the attention of many extreme creatures.

"Extreme Dao Tianheng Spear, this is an Extreme Dao Treasure, although it is a little incomplete, but it is still far beyond the ordinary perfect Treasure, I want to exchange this Extreme Dao Tianheng Spear for an Extreme Dao Treasure that can help the Extreme Dao True Body Attainment, the value is the same. "

The Lord of Dark Gold said.

"The Extreme Dao Heavenly Constant Spear, the Eternal Era, the weapon of the Extreme Dao Demon Ape, can be imagined in the Battle of the Eternal Era, the Extreme Dao Demon Ape Lord was killed by several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the End of the Realm, and the Extreme Dao Heavenly Heng Spear was also cracked, otherwise, the value of this Extreme Dao Treasure increased by at least dozens of times. "

"If it is really a complete Extreme Dao Heavenly Heng Spear, the Lord of Dark Gold will definitely not take it out and trade it!"

"It's a pity that I didn't let the Extreme Dao True Body break through to the Extreme Dao Realm Extreme Dao Treasure, otherwise I would really be willing to take it out and trade this Extreme Dao Treasure!"

There was a lot of talk about it, but no one came out to trade.

"I didn't expect that there was an Extreme Treasure Transaction here, although it was incomplete, but it was also very amazing!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

After all, it was the first time he had seen the Extreme Treasure Deal.
